prompt: Extrait le texte de l'image a_trier/agents/exemple-prompt-A-1-2.png et mets-le dans un fichier.
assertions: Output file is named exemple-prompt-A-1-2.md (same base name as the source image, .md extension, not .txt)
Output uses Markdown headings/lists for the visible title and bullet structure rather than a flat text dump
Output contains only verbatim transcribed text, with no 'Résumé'/'Summary' section (none was requested)
Transcription accurately reflects the French text and placeholders in the image without paraphrasing, translating, or summarizing it
